(:E, :EA, :A, true) ;; (:E, :EP, :P, true) ;; (:EA, :EAB, :B, true) ;; (:EA, :EAQ, :Q, true)|(:EP, :EPQ, :Q, true) ;; (:EAB, :EPQ, :iso, false)
